purpose: Record the boundary after the 120-to-900 address map preserved anchor-and-reverse transport classes.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This records transport preservation for source-facing relation classes.
Transport preservation is not full transport closure.
Transport preservation is not a return cycle.
Transport preservation is not an independent witness layer.
Transport preservation is not a full 41-seam lift.

summary.terminal_reason: The B plus C_plus_1 address map preserves the tested anchor-and-reverse transport grammar. shared_B preserves address slot and reverse_partner swaps slot/fiber coordinates. The admitted four expose the whole 120-record carrier, but they do not close it. This is transport preservation, not full transport closure, not a return cycle, not an independent witness, not full G900, and not Gap A closure.

boundary_record.short_form: Transport preservation is real. Closure is still missing.
keeper_lines: The B plus C_plus_1 address map preserves anchor-and-reverse transport.
The admitted four expose the whole 120-record carrier.
The admitted four do not form a closed subgraph.
No independent witness layer is proven.
positive_results: The transport preservation test was recorded.
The address map remained injective with 120 unique addresses.
The address map had zero collisions.
The admitted records reached all 120 records through the anchor-and-reverse graph.
negative_results: The admitted subgraph was not closed.
There were admitted boundary edges leaving the admitted set.
No full transport closure was found.
No independent witness layer was found.
No full G900 admission was found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator was derived.
blocked_promotions: Do not call transport preservation full closure.
Do not call exposure of the carrier return-cycle closure.
Do not call the address map a full 41-seam lift.
Do not call this an independent witness.
Do not call this full G900.
Do not call this Gap A closure.
allowed_next_work: Search for return-cycle candidates in the 900-address frame.
Test whether admitted boundary edges have structured return paths.
Test whether the exposed 120-carrier has a receipted return pattern.
Search for an independent witness layer over the transport-preserving address map.
Use transport preservation as a constraint, not as a conclusion.

interpretation.main_result: The 120-to-900 address map preserves anchor-and-reverse transport.
interpretation.meaning: The map is not merely injective; it respects the two tested source-facing relation types.
interpretation.why_this_matters: This connects the 900-address frame to transport behavior rather than only address placement.
interpretation.why_not_closure: The admitted records expose the carrier but do not close it. No return cycle, independent witness, full lift, or full G900 admission is proven.
interpretation.next_move: Search for return-cycle candidates in the 900-address frame.

claim.short_form: Transport preservation is real. Closure is still missing.
claim.not_closed_reason: The admitted records expose the carrier but do not close it. No return cycle, independent witness, full lift, or full G900 admission is proven.
claim.next_problem: Search for return-cycle candidates in the 900-address frame.
